name: Spicy Corn and Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Mexicorn, (corn and red and green peppers), 11 oz, drained
2 tbsp Fresh Jalapeno pepper, finely chopped
1/4 cup Rice Wine Vinegar or White Wine Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients and mix well. In a small bowl, whisk together the oil, vinegar, orange juice, garlic, and salt until blended. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
Just before serving, drain the salad (if necessary). Stir in the cilantro, orange peel, and cumin seeds. Serve in lettuce-lined bowls or on lettuce-lined plates. This recipe makes 11 servings of approximately 1/2 cup each.
